[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 1111000000 4
1 1011111001 7
2 0011101010 5
3 1100001101 5
4 0011011101 6
5 1111100110 7
6 1011111101 8
7 1111011011 8

70 1111111111 a
